heading: Amount of payment
label: 21022 Amount of payment
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15422 of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The amount of a payment made to an eligible State or an eligible unit of local government for a year under this subpart shall be determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Continuing availability of funds after appropriation
children.label: b Continuing availability of funds after appropriation
children.text: A payment made to an eligible State or eligible unit of local government under this subpart shall be available without fiscal year limitation.
